ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the incident occurred */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the incident occurred */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address where the incident occurred */,
  "num_killed" INTEGER /* Number of people killed in the incident */,
  "num_injured" INTEGER /* Number of people injured in the incident */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the incident location */,
  "long" REAL /* Longitude of the incident location */,
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident type */,
  "weapon_type" TEXT /* Type of weapon used in the incident */,
  "suspect_id" INTEGER /* ID of the suspect involved in the incident */,
  "victim_ids" TEXT /* IDs of the victims involved in the incident */,
  "police_response_time" TEXT /* Time it took for the police to respond */,
  "media_coverage" TEXT /* Level of media coverage the incident received */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of the incident data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_incident_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type_id") REFERENCES incident_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_suspect_id FOREIGN KEY ("suspect_id") REFERENCES suspects ("suspect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "gun_laws" TEXT /* Information about the state's gun laws */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "police_force_size" INTEGER /* Size of the city's police force */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident type */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the incident type */,
  "legal_implications" TEXT /* Legal implications of the incident type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident detail */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "additional_witnesses" INTEGER /* Number of additional witnesses */,
  "evidence_collected" TEXT /* Information about the evidence collected at the scene */,
  "follow_up_actions" TEXT /* Information about any follow-up actions taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_details_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_details_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES incident_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suspects" (
  "suspect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suspect */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the suspect */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the suspect */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the suspect */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the suspect */,
  "criminal_record" TEXT /* Criminal record of the suspect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suspect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "victims" (
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each victim */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the victim */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the victim */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the victim */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the victim */,
  "medical_condition" TEXT /* Medical condition of the victim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("victim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., law enforcement, media, etc.) */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, researcher) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
